description_long: This is a pair of eyeglasses with a bold, full-rim rectangular frame featuring a striking marbled pattern in shades of black, white, and tan. The frame is relatively thick, giving it a sturdy and fashionable appearance, while the temples are straight and maintain the same marbled design, adding visual continuity. The lenses are clear and untinted, suggesting they are either prescription or fashion lenses. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, with a gentle curve for comfort. The temples appear to have some printed or patterned detailing on the inner side, possibly including text or symbols. No visible brand logo is present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A bold, marbled rectangular pair of glasses with thick full rims and clear lenses, featuring patterned temples and a solid bridge.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, thick temple and the marbled pattern along the arm and frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular full-rim frame, clear lenses, and the continuous marbled design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other temple's marbled pattern and the frame's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the inside of the frame and temples, with visible inner detailing and the bridge's gentle curve.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, bold geometry and a continuous marbled pattern. The frame is robust and fashion-forward, with straight temples and a solid, integrated bridge.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are clear and fully transparent, with no visible tint, gradient, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, integrated bridge with a gentle curve, forming a continuous part of the frame without separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight and thick, featuring the same marbled pattern as the frame, with additional printed or patterned detailing visible on the inner side.
